sizeQuiz.heading: Size Finder
sizeQuiz.description: Answer 3 quick questions and we'll recommend the right fit.
sizeQuiz.q1: What do you need earplugs for?
sizeQuiz.q2: How do regular earbud tips normally fit you?
sizeQuiz.resultXSDesc: You have a smaller ear canal — XS gives you the best seal.
sizeQuiz.resultLDesc: You have a larger ear canal — L ensures a proper seal.
sizeQuiz.resultSDesc: Most young adults fit Small comfortably.
sizeQuiz.resultSMDesc: Small and Medium are both popular — the S&M kit lets you try both.
sizeQuiz.resultKitDesc: Can't decide? Our most popular kit includes both S and M so you can find your perfect fit.

compareTable.heading: Earasers vs. the alternatives
compareTable.sub: Good hearing protection shouldn't cost a fortune or muffle everything.

howItWorks.heading: How It Works
howItWorks.sub: Three smart ideas. One very small earplug.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Sound enters your ear naturally before any filtering happens. That's what keeps music sounding like music, and not like you're listening through a wall.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Earasers' patented open-canal design delivers crystal-clear audio while precisely filtering specific frequencies. This allows you to hear voices naturally, while reducing only the unwanted noise.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Made from Medical Grade Silicone, Earasers shapes to the form of your ear canal – Making it Custom Fit.

reviews.heading: Real people. Real opinions.
reviews.sub: Rated 4.7 out of 5 by over 1,000 customers

cards.text: Much better and cheaper than all the custom-fitted earplugs from established brands I have had!
These are perfect. They fit in very nicely, are barely visible, and balance the sound beautifully.
Great customer service. They sent me the mediums plus the filter removal tool free of charge!
Happy with my Earasers. I found it a bit hard to choose the size but eventually went with their advice and it was spot on.
The soft material and anatomical shape made this a perfect fit. Extremely comfortable and surprisingly effective.
They do a good job at blocking out scaler noise while still letting me hear my patients clearly. Worth every cent.
